steps.title: Spot the concession structure
steps.content: The word although concedes that income constrained fuel choice, but immediately pivots to several circumstances that also influenced decisions.

steps.title: Determine what this concession achieves
steps.content: The concession allows the text to grant income's importance while showing the model overstated it. A and B misidentify this as raising a preemptive objection or claiming the model has no support, while D confuses the complication of a model with its refutation. That matches choice C — C is correct.
